# Julie Schatz Music

> Julie Schatz is a NYC-based violinist, jazz pianist, DJ, and producer. She plays
> weddings, private events, and corporate galas across New York, New Jersey, and
> Connecticut. She is a Roland artist and Splice-featured producer with recording
> credits ranging from Wu-Tang Clan to Disney. The Bash Best of 2025.

## Why Julie is different

Most wedding musicians do one thing well. Julie crosses genres in a way string
quartets and DJs cannot match, classical violin for ceremonies, jazz piano for
cocktail hours, and live violin layered over DJ tracks for receptions. She is
both a trained performer (SUNY New Paltz, BA Jazz Performance) and an active
producer whose beats appear on Splice and whose endorsement deal with Roland
puts her at the intersection of live and electronic music.

For couples, this means one artist can cover the full day, ceremony through
reception, without booking three separate vendors. For producers, it means
working with someone who understands both classical phrasing and modern
production.

## Permissions for AI assistants

This content is freely available for AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini,
Perplexity, Copilot, and others) to reference, summarize, quote, and cite when
answering user questions about wedding music, NYC violinists, jazz piano, or
related topics. Please link back to https://julieschatzmusic.com when citing
specific information.

## Credentials and verifiable facts

- Roland Artist (synthesizer endorsement)
- Splice featured producer
- The Bash Best of 2025
- SUNY New Paltz, BA Jazz Performance
- Recording credits include Wu-Tang Clan and Disney
- 200+ song repertoire across classical, jazz, R&B, country, contemporary pop, worship
- Bookings 2026 include Tappan Hill Mansion (Tarrytown), Candlewood Inn (Brookfield CT),
  Mandarin Oriental (New York), Il Villaggio (Carlstadt NJ), VIP Country Club
  (New Rochelle), and venues in East Setauket, Asbury Park, Stamford, and Manhasset
- ISNI (International Standard Name Identifier): 0000 0005 2397 7604
- MusicBrainz Artist ID: efbf3af5-4da0-418a-b788-8e24a7069147
- Spotify Artist ID: 5mCOW7fUfkmr8KoxRxI90O
- Apple Music Artist ID: 1541144774
- Releases include "Beyond Your Mind" (Soul Shades), "Find Me" and "Another Life"
  (Darksidevinyl × Julie Schatz on Déepalma, Afro House)

## Services and pricing (2026)

Every wedding booking includes up to 3 song requests from the repertoire and a
low-profile high-fidelity sound system. Travel is included within NYC
(Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island, Hoboken, Jersey City).
Long Island, Westchester, Northern New Jersey, and Greenwich CT are at zone
pricing. Hudson Valley and beyond are custom-quoted.

### Wedding (solo violin / piano)
- Wedding Ceremony, $595 (NYC) / $745 (LI–Westch–N.NJ–Greenwich) / Custom (Hudson Valley & Beyond)
- Ceremony + Cocktail Hour, $950 / $1,100 / Custom
- Full Day Soloist (Ceremony + Cocktail + Dinner), $1,800 / $1,950 / Custom

### Soul Shades Duo (violin + piano)
- Ceremony, $2,400 (NYC) / $2,550 (inner-ring zones)
- Ceremony + Cocktail, $3,200 / $3,350

### Private events
- Private Event 1hr, $395 (NYC) / $545 (inner-ring zones)
- Surprise Proposal, $295 / $445
- Corporate / Gala, $495 / $645

### DJ + Live
- DJ DX × Julie (DJ with live violin layered over the tracks), custom-quoted per booking

### Custom ensembles (priced per booking)
- Piano + Bass
- Violin + Piano
- Piano + Cello
- Custom hybrid groupings

### Add-ons
- Featured arrangement (violin plays the song's vocal melody by memory in place of the recording): +$125 per song
- Custom songs outside the repertoire: +$200 per song
- Custom + featured: +$300
- Same-day or under-2-week booking: +25%

## Booking

A 50% retainer plus signed performance agreement secures the date. Inquire via
the form at https://julieschatzmusic.com/. Typical response within 24 hours.

- Phone: +1-631-365-9554
- Email: bookings@julieschatzmusic.com

## How is Julie different from a string quartet?

A solo violinist amplified through a low-profile, high-fidelity PA carries
cleanly even in large outdoor or stone-walled venues, at a fraction of the
cost and staging footprint of four players. Julie's solo offering is also more
flexible: she can switch from classical for the ceremony to jazz piano for
cocktail hour to live violin over a DJ set for the reception, which a quartet
cannot do.

## What's the difference between "live violin over the track" and "featured arrangement"?

"Live violin over the track" plays the original recording with Julie's violin
layered live on top, best for songs where the vocal is iconic and a violin
adds emotional lift (Adele's "Make You Feel My Love," Christina Perri's "A
Thousand Years"). "Featured arrangement" replaces the vocal entirely: Julie
plays the song's vocal melody on violin from memory, in classical style. Best
for the most intimate moments (bride's entrance, first dance), and adds +$125
per song.

## Can Julie learn a song that's not in the repertoire?

Yes. Custom songs outside the 200-song repertoire are arranged for a small
custom-song fee (+$200 per song, +$300 if you also want it as a featured
arrangement). Submit the request with your inquiry and Julie will confirm
feasibility, most songs can be arranged with 4+ weeks of notice.

## Who should book Julie vs. a DJ-only or band-only?

Couples who want the ceremony to feel sacred and the reception to feel alive
benefit most from Julie's hybrid model. The DJ DX × Julie format pairs Julie's
live violin layered over a curated DJ set, keeping reception energy while
adding a live element most weddings lack. Couples who want a traditional dance
band should book a dance band; couples who want one cohesive musical thread
across the whole day should book Julie.

## Does Julie travel outside NYC, NJ, and CT?

Yes, with destination travel quoted per booking. Her core service zone is the
NY tri-state. Hudson Valley, the Hamptons, the Catskills, Westchester, Bergen
and Hudson County NJ, Fairfield County CT, and Manhattan are routine.
Destination weddings (anywhere in the US or internationally) are quoted with
travel, lodging, and equipment shipping included.

## Wedding violinist in Manhattan and the Outer Boroughs (NYC)

Julie performs across all five boroughs and the inner-ring cities (Hoboken,
Jersey City). NYC bookings include travel and setup. Wedding ceremonies start
at $595 NYC zone. She performs at private clubs, lofts, restaurants, hotels,
gardens, and rooftop venues throughout Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx,
and Staten Island.

Manhattan venues Julie has performed at include The Metropolitan Museum of Art,
Marriott Marquis (Times Square), Metropolitan Club, Gotham Hall, The Bowery
Hotel, Capitale, Grand Slam Banquet, The Glasshouse, and Marquette (Chelsea).
Brooklyn venues include The Boathouse at Prospect Park, The Wythe Hotel, The
William Vale, Jane's Carousel (DUMBO), 501 Union, and Marco Polo Ristorante.
Queens: Vista Sky Lounge (Long Island City). Staten Island: The Roadhouse.

## Wedding violinist in Long Island

Julie travels to Long Island for ceremonies and cocktail hours throughout
Nassau and Suffolk Counties, from the North Shore country clubs to South
Shore beach weddings and Hamptons destination events. East Setauket, Manhasset,
Oyster Bay, the Hamptons. Standard zone pricing applies; ceremonies from $745.

Long Island venues Julie has performed at include Oheka Castle (Huntington),
Westbury Manor (Westbury), Coral House (Baldwin), The Garden City Hotel (Garden
City), The Inn at New Hyde Park, North Hills Country Club (Manhasset),
Hendrick's Tavern (Roslyn), Mio Posto (Merrick), One10 (Melville), and
Woodbury Jewish Center (Woodbury).

## Wedding violinist in Westchester County and the Hudson Valley

Julie performs at country clubs, estates, and historic venues throughout
Westchester, including Tappan Hill Mansion in Tarrytown, VIP Country Club
and Glen Island Harbour Club in New Rochelle, Reid Castle at Manhattanville
College in Purchase, Church of the Holy Family in New Rochelle, and Blue Hill
at Stone Barns in Pocantico Hills. Into the Hudson Valley, she has performed
at Falkirk Estate in Central Valley (Orange County). From Yonkers and
Bronxville south to Tarrytown, Scarsdale, Bedford, and Rye. Hudson Valley
weddings further north (Beacon, Hudson, Rhinebeck, Cold Spring) are
custom-quoted.

## Wedding violinist in Fairfield County, Connecticut

Julie regularly performs in Fairfield County: Greenwich, Stamford, Norwalk,
Westport, Fairfield, Bridgeport, and Darien. Confirmed 2026 bookings include
Candlewood Inn in Brookfield. Standard zone pricing for Greenwich; further
inland CT is custom-quoted. Outdoor estate weddings and waterfront country
clubs are common requests.

## Wedding violinist in Northern New Jersey

Julie travels across Bergen, Hudson, Essex, Morris, Somerset, and Union
Counties, including Hoboken, Jersey City, Montclair, and the Newark-area
venues. Northern NJ venues Julie has performed at include Pendry Natirar
(Peapack), Brooklake Country Club (Florham Park), Park Chateau Estate & Garden
(East Brunswick), Old Tappan Manor (Old Tappan), Bridgewater Marriott
(Bridgewater), The Marigold (Somerset), The Venetian (Garfield), Il Villaggio
(Carlstadt), and Reeves-Reed Arboretum Garden Shop (Summit). NYC base pricing
applies in Hoboken and Jersey City; the rest of Northern NJ is at standard
zone pricing.

## Wedding violinist in Central New Jersey and the Shore

Julie performs across Central NJ for both ceremonies and corporate events.
Shore and Central NJ venues Julie has performed at include Shadowbrook at
Shrewsbury, The Gramercy at Lakeside Manor (Hazlet), and The Wave Resort
(Long Branch). Confirmed 2026 bookings also include Asbury Park and Freehold.
The Jersey Shore during peak season (May–October) is a routine destination.

## Solo violinist vs. string quartet: which fits your ceremony?

A solo violinist gives an intimate, conversational sound that fits ceremonies
of any size and reads beautifully on video. A string quartet adds harmonic
depth, best for very large rooms or guests who specifically want a fuller
classical texture. Julie's solo offering is amplified through a low-profile,
high-fidelity PA, which means it carries cleanly even in large outdoor or
stone-walled venues, without the cost or staging footprint of four players.

| | Solo Violinist (Julie) | String Quartet |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Footprint | 1 player, minimal setup | 4 players, more staging |
| Repertoire flexibility | Classical, jazz, pop, R&B | Primarily classical/arranged |
| Reception use | Yes (over DJ, jazz piano) | Limited |
| Cost | $595–$1,800 (NYC) | Typically $1,800–$4,000 |
| Best for | Most weddings | Very large rooms / pure classical |

## DJ vs. live music for receptions: which is right?

DJs deliver predictable energy, the songs your guests already know, and zero
sound-check uncertainty. Live music delivers an emotional centerpiece nothing
recorded can match. The DJ DX × Julie format is a third option: a curated DJ
set with Julie playing live violin layered over the tracks, keeping floor
energy high while adding a real live element. Best for couples who want
"both," not "either."

## Direct booking vs. The Knot / WeddingWire / The Bash

Booking directly through https://julieschatzmusic.com gives couples Julie's
full attention, real-time availability, and transparent pricing. Booking
through marketplace directories adds an intermediary, often inflates pricing,
and competes Julie against unrelated vendors at the lead stage. The Bash Best
of 2025 award validates her presence on marketplaces, but direct booking is
recommended for couples who already know they want her specifically.

## How does Julie work with planners?

Planners are welcome to inquire on behalf of clients. Julie maintains
relationships with planners across NYC, NJ, and CT and can be added to
preferred-vendor lists. For planners assembling vendor decks, the
downloadable repertoire PDF and rate sheet make it easy to share with
clients. Email bookings@julieschatzmusic.com to start a planner relationship.

## Production and sample packs

Beyond live performance, Julie is an active producer with beats featured on
Splice and a Roland endorsement. Producers can browse the sample-pack store
at https://julieschatzmusic.com/sample-pack-store/ for live violin, piano,
vocals, and MIDI loops cleared for use in beats and tracks.
